description: This file contains unit tests for the Bootstrap Popover component, testing its API, behavior, and integration with jQuery.

methods.name: describe
methods.description: Defines test suites for the Popover component.

methods.name: beforeAll
methods.description: Sets up the fixture element before all tests.

methods.name: afterEach
methods.description: Cleans up the fixture after each test.

methods.name: it
methods.description: Defines individual test cases for Popover behavior.

methods.name: addEventListener
methods.description: Attaches event handlers to DOM elements for testing popover events.

methods.name: dispatchEvent
methods.description: Simulates user interactions like mouseout and click.
